home.title: Hi! My name is Jan Paul
home.p1: I am a software engineer with way too much energy, who creates and develops experiences that make people's lives simple and awesome. I am an aspiring Hugo Boss model and (try to be) a Club DJ.
home.p2: I live in the beautiful Jordaan, a neighborhood in Amsterdam bustling with culture and history, where every street corner tells its own story. My passion for travel has led me to faraway places, but I always love returning to the coziness of my own city. In addition to my adventures around the world, I love making the stand unsafe on my fixed gear. The feeling of freedom as I zigzag through the narrow streets, the wind in my hair, is incomparable.
home.p3: I also practice taekwondo, a discipline that not only challenges me physically, but also instills mental resilience and self-discipline. It is the perfect outlet after a long day at the computer and helps me stay balanced.
home.p4: My life is a mix of exploring new cultures, enjoying the little things, and always looking for the next adventure. Whether that's a faraway trip, a new game I'm developing, the perfect drift in a fast car, or a new technique in taekwondo.

50.p1: On June 11, 2024, I'm hitting the big 5-0 – kind of a big deal for me. I usually don't do birthday parties, but this time I don't want to let it pass by unnoticed. So, how about hanging out at
50.p2: from 7 PM till late on Tuesday on june 11th? It would be awesome if you could make it.
50.rsvp: Can you let me know if you're coming?
50.reach: For questions you can reach me at

coming.yes: I'm coming to your party for sure
coming.no: I can't make it to your party
coming.maybe: I will let you know, while figuring out an excuse
